name: Genie Spells
description: When you reach a Paladin level specified in the Genie Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared. At 3rd level: Chromatic Orb, Elementalism, Thunderous Smite. At 5th level: Mirror Image, Phantasmal Force. At 9th level: Fly, Gaseous Form. At 13th level: Conjure Minor Elementals, Summon Elemental. At 17th level: Banishing Smite, Contact Other Plane.
